articles.title: Genesis, Vault Create A$13 Billion Australian Gold Mining Giant
articles.summary: Regis withdrew its competing bid, clearing the way for the merger expected to close by November.

articles.title: Regis Resources Won’t Match Genesis Bid For Vault Minerals
articles.summary: Regis Resources said it won’t match a rival US$3.9 billion bid for Vault Minerals made by Genesis Minerals, as a planned merger of the gold-mining companies would then no longer meet its thresholds for value and returns.

articles.title: Genesis Launches A$5.6 Billion Bid to Create Gold Mining Giant
articles.summary: Genesis tops Regis' deal for Vault with a cash-and-stock offer valuing the combined miner at around A$13 billion.

articles.title: Genesis Minerals Makes Rival $3.9 Billion Bid For Vault Minerals
articles.summary: Genesis Minerals has made a rival bid for Vault Minerals that values the Australian gold miner at $3.9 billion, trumping an agreed merger with Regis Resources.

articles.title: Is Regis Resources (ASX:RRL) Still Attractive After Its Strong Three Year Share Price Run
articles.summary: Wondering if Regis Resources at A$6.85 still offers value after a strong run, or if the easy gains are behind it? This article focuses on what the current price might imply about the stock's valuation. Regis Resources has had a mixed share price experience recently, with a 3% decline over the last week, a 7.1% decline over the last month, and a 10.2% decline year to date, set against a 45.3% return over the last year and a very large 3 year gain. Recent news coverage has largely centred on...

articles.title: Regis Resources Vault Minerals Merger Creates New Gold Scale And Questions
articles.summary: Regis Resources (ASX:RRL) and Vault Minerals have agreed to an all scrip merger. The combined group is expected to become Australia's third largest gold producer. Planned production capacity is projected to exceed 700,000 ounces of gold per year. The merger is expected to deliver corporate tax savings and broader access to capital markets. Regis Resources, listed on the ASX as RRL, is a gold producer that now plans to combine with Vault Minerals to form a much larger group. For gold sector...

articles.title: Regis And Vault Forge A$10.7 Billion Gold Giant
articles.summary: Regis will acquire Vault in an all-share deal, creating Australia's third-largest gold producer by market capitalization.

articles.title: Regis, Vault sign $7.68bn merger agreement
articles.summary: Vault shareholders will receive 0.6947 new fully paid ordinary shares in Regis for each Vault share they hold.

articles.title: Regis Resources to Acquire Vault Minerals to Create $7.67 Billion Gold Miner
articles.summary: The combined entity will have a pro forma market capitalization of about $7.67 billion, and annual gold production estimated at more than 700,000 troy ounces.

articles.title: Regis Resources Limited entered into scheme of arrangement to acquire Vault Minerals Limited in a merger of equals transaction for AUD 5.1 billion. - marketscreener.com
articles.summary: Regis Resources Limited entered into scheme of arrangement to acquire Vault Minerals Limited in a merger of equals transaction for AUD 5.1 billion. marketscreener.com

articles.title: Perenti extends Duketon mining contract with Regis
articles.summary: The extension continues operations until at least 30 March 2029, adding approximately A$180m ($125m) in value over the additional 12 months.

articles.title: We Think Shareholders Will Probably Be Generous With Regis Resources Limited's (ASX:RRL) CEO Compensation - simplywall.st
articles.summary: We Think Shareholders Will Probably Be Generous With Regis Resources Limited's (ASX:RRL) CEO Compensation simplywall.st
